archetype: Archetype 2: Tactical Command Center (Modified for Industrial Brutalism)
vibe: Iron Man JARVIS / Terminal Cyberpunk / Brutalist Tech

headings.usage: Main dashboard titles, large metric numbers, system headers.

body.usage: Logs, chat memory, route database, commands, terminal output, metrics.

layout.alignment: Optical alignment, strictly left-aligned for data density and terminal feel.

surfaces.glassmorphism: forbidden, use solid dark backgrounds with hard borders only

motion.hover: Instant border color change to Amber (#F59E0B), slight bg lighten. No soft transitions to mimic immediate mechanical feedback.
motion.logs: New log entries appear instantly without slide animations to mimic true terminal speed.

real_time_status.style: Top bar, solid black (#0A0A0A), hard bottom border. Status tags like [ONLINE], [LISTENING] in monospace with respective colors and a blinking block cursor.

chat_viewer.style: Log-style chat. NOT bubbly. Flat rectangular blocks or raw text lines. User: right-aligned or prefixed with 'USR >'. MAVIS: prefixed with 'SYS >' or 'MAVIS //' with amber border-left.

route_database.style: Dense data table. border-collapse. Mono-spaced KM. Hover row highlight (bg-zinc-900). No rounded corners on the table wrapper.

reports_gallery.style: Brutalist cards. No border-radius. Thick 1px borders. Accent colored action buttons (copy/download) with stark contrast.

command_console.style: CLI-style input fixed at bottom or in a dedicated panel. Prefix 'MAVIS //' before input field. No border on the input itself, only on the wrapper.

logs_stream.style: Pure terminal view. text-xs, JetBrains Mono. Color coded log levels (INFO, WARN, ERR). Auto-scroll to bottom. Deepest black background.

routines_panel.style: Tactical grid of buttons. High contrast. 1px solid border. Hover states invert background to Amber and text to Black.

icons.style: Duotone or Regular, sharp and technical.

image_urls.description: Metallic honeycomb structure, use at very low opacity (5-10%) for empty states or login screen background to give an industrial tech feel.
Abstract digital landscape cyber grid, use inside the 'AI processing' visualizer or status card when MAVIS is actively thinking or generating a report.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure pure white text on #0A0A0A passes APCA. Use Text Shadow if overlaid on imagery.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='command-console-input').

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement pure dark mode (no light mode toggle required as this is a command center).
Use JetBrains Mono for all data, tables, inputs, and logs. Use Outfit ONLY for large titles and prominent metrics.
Do NOT use standard rounded cards. Override Shadcn Card defaults to rounded-none and explicit 1px borders (#27272A).
The UI must feel like an industrial control panel or terminal. Prioritize data density and high contrast over white space.
Do not use generic blue gradients, teal, or purple. Stick strictly to the Obsidian, White, and Amber/Orange palette.
Implement the Chat Memory not as WhatsApp bubbles, but as terminal system logs or flat brutalist rectangles.
